/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/py_tokenizer.dir/link.d  -o py_tokenizer.cpython-314-aarch64-linux-android.so CMakeFiles/py_tokenizer.dir/src/binding.cpp.o  libtokenizer_core.a /data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib/libpython3.14.so
